scripts.cljs:watch: shadow-cljs watch app portfolio-worker portfolio-optimizer-worker vault-detail-worker
scripts.cljs:watch:portfolio: shadow-cljs watch app portfolio portfolio-worker portfolio-optimizer-worker vault-detail-worker
scripts.dev: npm run build-id:refresh && concurrently -k -n TAILWIND,CLJS "npm run css:watch" "npm run cljs:watch"
scripts.dev:browser-inspection: npm run build-id:refresh && concurrently -k -n TAILWIND,CLJS "npm run css:watch" "npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn watch app portfolio-worker portfolio-optimizer-worker vault-detail-worker"
scripts.dev:portfolio: npm run build-id:refresh && concurrently -k -n TAILWIND,CLJS "npm run css:watch" "npm run cljs:watch:portfolio"
scripts.portfolio: npm run build-id:refresh && concurrently -k -n TAILWIND,PORTFOLIO "npm run css:watch" "npm run portfolio:watch"
scripts.dev:proxy: npm run build-id:refresh && concurrently -k -n TAILWIND,CLJS,PROXY "npm run css:watch" "npm run cljs:watch" "npm run proxy:dev"
scripts.build: npm run build-id:refresh && npm run css:build && npx shadow-cljs release app portfolio-worker portfolio-optimizer-worker vault-detail-worker && node tools/release-assets/generate_release_artifacts.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:runner:generate && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile test && node out/test.js
scripts.test:websocket: npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile ws-test && node out/ws-test.js
scripts.coverage: npm run test:runner:generate && rm -rf .coverage coverage && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile test && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile ws-test && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.coverage node out/test.js && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.coverage node out/ws-test.js && c8 report --temp-directory .coverage
scripts.coverage:ci: npm run coverage && npm run coverage:check
scripts.check: npm run test:runner:generate && npm run test:crap && npm run test:mutation && npm run test:formal-tooling && npm run test:tla-tooling && npm run test:multi-agent && npm run test:optimizer-spike && npm run lint:test && npm run lint:hiccup && npm run lint:input-parsing && npm run lint:docs && npm run lint:docs:test && npm run lint:namespace-sizes && npm run lint:namespace-sizes:test && npm run lint:namespace-boundaries && npm run lint:namespace-boundaries:test && npm run test:release-assets && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile app && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile portfolio && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile portfolio-worker && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile portfolio-optimizer-worker && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile vault-detail-worker && npx shadow-cljs --force-spawn compile test
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:runner:generate && shadow-cljs watch test
scripts.test:repl: npm run test:runner:generate && shadow-cljs cljs-repl test
